channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Political standoff between Congress and BRS over Telangana Gurukul procurement allegations escalates in Hyderabad
item.description: A political confrontation between Telangana’s ruling Congress party and the opposition Bharat Rashtra Samithi (BRS) intensified in Hyderabad, centering on allegations of irregularities in procurement ...

item.title: Poilievre criticizes Carney’s economic record, calling public perception an ‘illusion’
item.description: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre has argued that Prime Minister Mark Carney’s strong public approval is based on perception rather than measurable economic results. In an interview with podcaster ...

item.title: Manila Implements Road Closures and Alternative Routes for INC Rally on July 2
item.description: Authorities in Manila have announced widespread road closures and traffic rerouting measures on Thursday, July 2, in response to a rally organized by the religious group Iglesia ni Cristo (INC) at Liw...

item.title: Ombudsman filing of plunder case vs Marcoleta expected to proceed this week, Clavano says
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman is expected to move forward with the filing of a plunder case against Representative Marcoleta within the week, according to statements attributed to Justice spokesperson a...

item.title: Kilifi County allocates Sh10 million to support SHA registration for widows and orphans
item.description: Kilifi County Government has announced the allocation of Sh10 million to facilitate the registration of widows, widowers, and orphans under the Social Health Authority (SHA) programme. The initiative ...

item.title: Wayve advances end-to-end AI driving system to make autonomous vehicles behave more like human drivers
item.description: London-based autonomous driving startup Wayve is gaining significant attention in the global technology and automotive sectors due to its innovative approach to self-driving vehicles. The company has ...

item.title: Kenyan Government Plans Reduction of PAYE Tax Following Public Consultation
item.description: Treasury Cabinet Secretary John Mbadi has assured Kenyans that the government is still committed to reducing Pay As You Earn (PAYE) tax, despite delays in rolling out the proposal. Speaking during a t...

item.title: Israeli Knesset approves preliminary bill restricting mosque loudspeaker call to prayer
item.description: The Israeli parliament, known as the Knesset, has advanced a controversial bill that seeks to restrict the use of loudspeakers for the Islamic call to prayer from mosques. According to media reports, ...

item.title: Ontario judge increases sentence for repeat LCBO theft offender due to uncertainty over deportation enforcement
item.description: An Ontario Superior Court judge has imposed a 12-month prison sentence on a repeat offender convicted of multiple thefts from LCBO stores, rejecting a jointly proposed 90-day sentence between Crown an...

item.title: Google surpasses $1 billion investment milestone in Africa with new digital and AI initiatives
item.description: Google has confirmed that it has gone beyond its five-year target of investing $1 billion in Africa, marking a major milestone in its long-term commitment to the continent’s digital transformation. Th...

item.title: Court of Appeal rules that post-dated cheques do not amount to advance payment of insurance premium
item.description: The Court of Appeal (Lagos Division) has ruled in a dispute between Prestige Assurance Plc and Sara Product Limited that issuing post-dated cheques does not amount to advance payment of an insurance p...

item.title: Danny Glover announces Alzheimer’s diagnosis and speaks about living with the condition
item.description: Hollywood actor Danny Glover, best known for his roles in films such as Lethal Weapon and The Color Purple, has publicly revealed that he has been living with Alzheimer’s disease. The 79-year-old star...

item.title: DeSantis moves to implement Florida law designating multiple organizations as terrorist groups
item.description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced that the state will begin using a newly enacted law to designate and take action against what officials describe as terrorist organizations operating within Flo...

item.title: Lahore court extends interim bail of PML-N MPA and his wife in harassment case involving actress Momina Iqbal
item.description: A sessions court in Lahore has extended the interim pre-arrest bail of Pakistan Muslim League-Nawaz (PML-N) Member of Provincial Assembly Saqib Chadhar and his wife until July 13 in a case related to ...

item.title: Ombudsman summons Noel Rivera and Jojo Ang to respond to conflict of interest allegations
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman has moved to require public officials Noel Rivera and Jojo Ang to formally answer allegations involving an alleged conflict of interest. The action forms part of the Ombuds...

item.title: Pinarayi Vijayan alleges procedural violations in Kerala Finance Bill, claims tax cuts favored liquor companies
item.description: Kerala Leader of the Opposition Pinarayi Vijayan has accused the United Democratic Front (UDF) government of bypassing established legislative procedures to pass a Finance Bill that he claims was desi...

item.title: Tanzania collects TZS 1.327 trillion in state dividends to boost national development funding
item.description: Tanzania has recorded a strong financial performance after collecting 1.327 trillion shillings in dividends and statutory contributions from public institutions during the 2025/26 financial year. This...

item.title: UK expected to experience another heatwave as temperatures approach 30°C
item.description: Meteorologists are warning that a third heatwave in the United Kingdom is becoming increasingly likely over the coming days, with temperatures forecast to reach around 30°C in some regions. A strength...

item.title: Akhilesh Yadav criticises alleged egg attack on Mahua Moitra in West Bengal, calls for action
item.description: Samajwadi Party president Akhilesh Yadav has strongly condemned the alleged attack on Trinamool Congress MP Mahua Moitra in West Bengal, where BJP workers reportedly hurled eggs at her during a visit ...

item.title: DA leader Geordin Hill-Lewis outlines political and economic priorities in party address
item.description: DA leader Geordin Hill-Lewis delivered an address to party members and supporters focusing on what he described as a necessary shift in South Africa’s political and economic direction. In his remarks,...
